_comment: Copy this file to client.config.json and fill it in. Then run `npm run rebrand` to write lib/brand.ts.
name: Jane Fitness
tagline: Strength and nutrition coaching for women who lift.
description: Evidence-based strength training, nutrition, and recovery content for lifters — no fluff, no supplement shilling.

author.name: Jane Doe
author.bio: Jane is a strength coach and registered dietitian writing evidence-first guides for lifters.
author.longBio: I started Jane Fitness after a decade of coaching collegiate strength athletes and working as a clinical RD. The content here is everything I wish my clients could read in one place — the strength-training and nutrition research, translated into programs that actually hold up in the real world.
